name: Unmanned Remote Facility & Geodata Configuration
description:
EPA Tier2 Submit 2025 is open. Create a new facility record for 'Apex Pipeline - Station 7'. Configure the facility's status and geodata exactly as follows:
- Manned: No (Unmanned)
- Maximum Number of Occupants: 4
- Latitude: 31.8456
- Longitude: -103.5892
- Method of Collection: Global Positioning Method (GPS) (or closest match)
- Description of Spatial Data: Entrance Point (or Gate)
- Facility Notes / Remarks: 'EMERGENCY ACCESS: Red Knox-Box located at Main South Gate containing keys and SDS.'

Once complete, save and export the submission file to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\apex_station7_updated.t2s.
